title: The Old One returns all other field cards to owner decks

card.rawText: When summoned, return all cards aside from this card on the field back to their original owner's deck. All players then shuffle and draw the same number of cards they sent to their deck.

effect.target: All other cards on the field

plan.title: The Old One returns all other field cards to owner decks
plan.summary: Summon The Old One and verify all other field cards are returned to their original owners decks.

notes: When The Old One is summoned, all other field cards return to original owner decks.

steps: Return all other field cards to owner decks.
Verify mass return route is represented.
manualVerification: Verify against card text: When summoned, return all cards aside from this card on the field back to their original owner's deck. All players then shuffle and draw the same number of cards they sent to their deck.
riskNotes: A red result marks missing mass-return runtime support for The Old One.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_074_the_old_one-074-e01 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
